templates.body:
TEAM SHOWCASE SERIES CHARTER
Audience: our team (not customers yet)
Cadence: _______________  Slot length: ___ min + Q&A ___
Format: short slides + talk
Topic rule: interest or skill you care about (work OK, not required)
Not a performance review: Y
Rotation owner: _______________

TOPIC MENU (pick one)
[ ] Hobby or craft
[ ] Something you teach others
[ ] A day-in-the-life quirk (keep light)
[ ] A skill adjacent to work
[ ] A story of how you got good at X
Avoid: forced trauma, HR landmines, roasting teammates
Working title: _______________

SAFETY RAILS
Speaker: _______________
[ ] Notes OK  [ ] Sit or stand OK  [ ] Friend asks first question
[ ] Time-box hard so it ends
[ ] One praise + optional one tip only after
[ ] No grades
Practice once with lead if wanted: Y/N

TALK RUN SHEET
Speaker: _______________  Date: _______
Topic: _______________
Minutes: ___  Slides: ___
What the team learned about them: _______________
Speaking muscle note (private, kind): _______________

TRANSFER CHECKLIST
After N talks, person can:
[ ] Open a room with sales without freeze
[ ] Walk a customer through a short deck
[ ] Explain a process to another team live
Next stretch assignment: _______________
Date: _______
